what_it_does: Adds Tripo text/image-to-3D, animation, conversion, retopology, and preview nodes to ComfyUI.
succinct_summary: Useful as a node-based creative front end around Tripo generation rather than a rigging method itself.
possible_use: Prototype Morgan avatar prompt/image generation workflows inside ComfyUI.
important_notes: Requires Tripo API access and ComfyUI; secondary to direct SDK/MCP/Blender integrations.
